title: Inheritance Contract Gate
applies_to: Page09~Page17 and all later successor stages
global_must_inherit: Provider-Zero remains default unless provider sandbox policy explicitly permits a candidate path
memory write requires an explicit write contract
canon mutation requires an approved mutation path
runtime learning requires audit and rollback
ASD mutation requires patch proposal, author approval, reversible patch, and signed repair commit
8D literary values remain advisory while evidence integrity is gated
GIG begins as advisory contradiction intelligence
uploaded Codex / Narrative IDE Stage186~195 concepts are remapped into Page10~Page13 and later pages

must_not_override: commercial absorption cannot bypass lineage authority
Story Repository cannot bypass context provenance or safe projection
draft candidate is not committed manuscript
8D value cannot become hard literary quality gate without later promotion record
StoryPatch cannot update main story state before approval
shared world or character store cannot write into project state by default
runtime learning cannot change behavior without audit evidence
